data.title: WuXi Biologics Reports Record 2025 Annual Results, Operational Excellence Driven by Digital-Native Architecture
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Shanghai, WuXi Biologics (2269.HK), a top global Contract Research, Development, and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO), unveiled its 2025 annual performance data. This report showcased remarkable expansion and a significant operational advancement for the company.

data.title: Akamai Launches Brand Guardian to Help Enterprises Combat Automated Fraud
data.description: Akamai has introduced Brand Guardian, an AI solution designed to combat automated fraud and brand impersonation online. The tool boasts a remarkable 99.99% accuracy rate in taking down fraudulent activities across the web.

data.title: Amaze Highlights First Quarter 2026 Achievements and Upcoming Priorities in Letter to Shareholders
data.description: A company known as Amaze Holdings, Inc., operating under the ticker symbol AMZE on the NYSE American, recently released a letter to its shareholders on March 25, 2026, from Newport Beach, California. Amaze, a prominent player in creator-driven commerce on a global scale, shared its Q1 accomplishments and outlined its key goals for the rest of the year.

data.title: NOV Announces Expansion of Subsea Flexible Pipe Manufacturing Capacity to Support Growing Demand
data.description: On March 25, 2026, NOV Inc. revealed its intention to increase the capacity of its subsea flexible pipe manufacturing plant in Açu, Brazil. This expansion plan involves a $200 million investment to double the facility's capacity within the next three years. The investment is aimed at enhancing production capabilities and meeting the growing demand for subsea flexible pipes.

data.title: PDD Holdings Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 and Fiscal Year 2025 Unaudited Financial Results
data.description: Dublin and Shanghai, March 25, 2026 - PDD Holdings Inc. ("PDD Holdings" or the "Company") shared its unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2025. The company's ticker symbol is NASDAQ: PDD.

data.title: BOSS Zhipin Continues Share Repurchase Program; Cumulative Repurchases Reach Nearly RMB450 Million in FY26
data.description: On March 24, 2026, KANZHUN LIMITED (trading as “BOSS Zhipin”) (Nasdaq: BZ; HK: 2076) disclosed that it spent approximately RMB34.4 million to repurchase 748,552 ordinary shares as part of its share buyback initiative. In 2026 so far, the Company has used nearly RMB450 million for share repurchases, emphasizing its dedication to enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: Price prediction: UNI aims for $4.17 resistance by April 2026. Currently trading at $3.71 with RSI at 48.16. Support at $3.47. Bullish momentum growing despite MACD weakness.
data.description: The stock for UNI is currently trading at $3.71, with a neutral RSI of 48.16. Based on technical analysis, there is a resistance target of $4.17 and a support level at $3.47. Although there is weakness indicated by the MACD, there is a growing bullish momentum in the market for UNI.

data.title: KuCoin Showcases KuCard at Tomorrowland Winter, Reflecting Growing Interest in Simpler Crypto Access
data.description: KuCoin's recent launch emphasizes its larger goal of linking digital finance, culture, and user experiences through enhanced accessibility. The activation took place in Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands on March 25, 2026. KuCoin, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency platform known for its reliability and security, is leading the way in this initiative. This development aims to provide a seamless and intuitive entry point for users, facilitating their engagement with the digital financial world.

data.title: Segway Powersports Debuts Super Villain at The Mint 400 with P3 Podium Finish
data.description: Segway Powersports recently marked a successful entrance at the renowned Mint 400 event in Las Vegas, solidifying its position as a leading provider of smart off-road vehicles. The Mint 400 is a significant race in American Off-Road Racing, known for its challenging desert terrain. Taking place on March 25, 2026, in McKinney, Texas, the event showcased Segway Powersports' cutting-edge technologies and connected riding systems, making a lasting impression on attendees and enthusiasts alike. This debut highlighted the company's prowess in the industry and its dedication to innovation, capturing the attention of those involved in the off-road racing community.

data.title: LINK price aims $10.50 breakout by Apr 2026, currently at $9.39 with RSI neutral at 54.05. Potential rally if $9.68 resistance breaks, though bearish MACD signals caution.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink is currently trading at $9.39, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 54.05. Analysts predict a possible rally to $10.50 if LINK is able to surpass the $9.68 resistance level. However, bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals advise some caution to investors.

data.title: Comstock to Participate in the Lytham Partners 2026 Industrials & Basic Materials Investor Summit on April 1, 2026
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Virginia City, Nevada, Comstock Inc. (NYSE: LODE) disclosed its involvement in a webcast presentation at the Lytham Partners 2026 Industrials & Basic Materials Investor Summit. The event is scheduled to occur online on April 1, 2026. Comstock, also known as the Company, will take part in this virtual summit where it will engage with investors on industrial and basic materials matters.

data.title: Energy Fuels Announces First U.S. Primary Production of Critical "Heavy" Rare Earth Material in Decades
data.description: Energy Fuels has achieved a significant milestone in the U.S. critical mineral supply chains by successfully generating high-purity terbium oxide in Utah. The production was made possible by processing ore extracted from mines in Florida and Georgia. This marks a significant achievement as it represents the first instance of a U.S. mine-to-oxide capability. The production of "heavy" rare earth oxides, crucial in various industries, now has a secure western source.

data.title: Business Architecture Guild® Announces Chinese and Farsi Translations of The Business Architecture Quick Guide
data.description: Global access to essential business architecture guidance is being enhanced as the Business Architecture Guild®, a community of practitioners across 100+ countries, launches new language releases. The organization revealed the availability of foundational business architecture guidance in Chinese and other languages, on March 25, 2026, from its headquarters in San Francisco. This move aims to support a wider audience of professionals seeking to leverage this valuable resource in their respective fields.

data.title: Bliss Taps Piper Perabo to Relaunch Cult-Favorite Fabgirl Firm Body Cream
data.description: Reintroducing its signature firming formula, the spa-endorsed brand, Bliss, marked the occasion by launching a nostalgia-inspired campaign to celebrate the 25th anniversary of the movie Coyote Ugly. Founded in 1996, Bliss revealed the return of its iconic product through a drive filled with reminiscence. The announcement was made in New York on March 25, 2026, and the details can be found on Bliss's official website.
